assignments.name: message
assignments.value: Hi, I have not received my invoice for order #12345. Can you help?

parameters.content:
## Workflow of each node 
Node 1: Manual Trigger
  Starts the workflow
  ↓ passes: nothing (just a trigger)

Node 2: Customer Email Data
  Sets the customer information
  ↓ passes: name, email, subject, message

Node 3: AI Agent
  Reads the customer message and drafts a reply
  ↓ passes: ai output (the drafted email text)

Node 4: Format Review Data
  Combines AI draft + original customer details
  ↓ passes: ai_draft + name + email + subject + query

Node 5: Send Review Email
  Emails the manager with draft + approve/reject links
  ↓ passes: same data package (unchanged)

Node 6: WAIT — workflow completely pauses here
  ↓ nothing moves until manager clicks a link
  ↓ passes: original data + action (approve/reject)

Node 7: IF Check Decision
  Reads the action parameter
  ↓ TRUE (approve) → Node 8A
  ↓ FALSE (reject) → Node 8B

Node 8A: Send Email to Customer
  Delivers the approved draft to the customer
  ↓ passes: sent email confirmation

Node 8B: Log Rejection
  Records that draft was rejected
  ↓ passes: rejection status

Node 9: Postgres Log
  Saves the decision permanently to database
  ↓ end of workflow

parameters.subject: =ACTION REQUIRED — Review AI Draft for {{ $('Format Review Data').item.json.customer_name }}

Sign off as "Customer Support Team"
